posture: 23 roles · 9 strong-act · 2 recruiter-held interim/contract worth fast action (Robert Half SM Risk & Compliance contract; Cuscal SM Finance Risk contract) plus Shippit interim FC still live — new C-suite finance role at CatholicCare; senior-manager risk/governance weighted as core-target matches
summary: Morning run, browser-verified on Seek and Board Direction; I Work for NSW used a search fallback (its job board would not apply keyword filters via automation, so its items are leads). Strongest fresh find is a permanent C-suite finance role (Executive Director, Finance & Corporate Services at CatholicCare, Lewisham). The recruiter-held senior-manager risk/governance and interim/contract roles from earlier this week remain live and are still the time-critical surface. A manual look at the recruiter desks and AICD DO remains worthwhile; Seek and Board Direction were browser-verified this run.

items.headline: Independent Chairs & Members, Audit & Risk Committees — NSW Government (Sydney, prequalification panel)
items.summary: Standing NSW Government prequalification scheme through which agencies appoint independent chairs and members to their audit and risk committees.
items.so_what: Direct fit for your FCPA/FAICD audit-and-risk-committee profile and existing NED experience; register on the panel to be drawn on as agencies refresh committees.

items.headline: Company Secretary — The Skin Hospital, Darlinghurst (Sydney)
items.summary: Board-level company secretary for a not-for-profit specialist hospital, covering governance, board papers and statutory compliance.
items.so_what: Governance/company-secretary fit close to your board background; still live from earlier this week.

items.headline: Company Secretary — recruiter-held, Sydney (Profusion PAC)
items.summary: Recruiter-managed company secretary role for a Sydney organisation, focused on board governance and statutory duties.
items.so_what: Another company-secretary option matching your governance/NED experience; recruiter-held, so register interest directly.

items.headline: Non-Executive Director & committee vacancies across AU sectors — Board Direction listing platform
items.summary: Aggregated board/NED and committee vacancies nationally; current NSW listings include environment-sector committee members (x3) and an education-sector board member, published 29 Jun.
items.so_what: Browse for risk/audit-committee and energy/local-government boards that suit interstate-travel cadence; situational awareness rather than a single role.

items.headline: Directorship Opportunities — board roles nationally (AICD, member-gated)
items.summary: AICD's member-only Directorship Opportunities board adds roughly 15 roles a week; only public teasers are visible here.
items.so_what: As an FAICD, worth a manual login to DO — the strongest board supply is behind this gate and not visible to this scan.

items.headline: Executive Director, Finance & Corporate Services — CatholicCare, Lewisham (Sydney)
items.summary: Permanent CFO-equivalent executive leading finance and corporate services for a large Sydney not-for-profit; full-time, on-site/hybrid in the inner-west.
items.so_what: Strong, fresh direct match to your CFO/COO-track finance leadership and FCPA credential in an NFP setting; newly listed today — move early.

items.headline: Chief Risk Officer (CRO) — Revesby Workers' Club, Revesby (Sydney metro)
items.summary: Permanent CRO building and owning the enterprise risk and compliance framework for a large registered club group.
items.so_what: Direct CRO match in Sydney metro suited to your risk leadership; still live and a standout C-suite opening.

items.headline: General Manager, General Insurance — icare, Sydney
items.summary: Senior GM accountable for a general-insurance portfolio at the NSW statutory insurer.
items.so_what: Strong insurance/government sector fit and executive level; lean is operational insurance-line leadership, so weigh against your risk/finance core — newly listed.

items.headline: Senior Manager, Finance Risk, Controls & Governance (contract) — Cuscal, Sydney (Hybrid)
items.summary: Contract senior manager owning finance risk, controls and governance for a listed payments/financial-services provider.
items.so_what: Core-target senior-manager risk/governance match in FS on a contract basis; still live and time-critical — contact fast.

items.headline: Senior Manager — Risk & Compliance (Contract Management) — Robert Half, Sydney CBD
items.summary: Recruiter-held contract senior-manager role leading risk and compliance across a contract-management function.
items.so_what: §1a recruiter interim/contract role in your core risk/compliance space — speed-critical, apply/contact Robert Half today.

items.headline: Senior Risk, Compliance & Financial Crime Lead — recruiter-held, Sydney CBD (Ink Recruitment)
items.summary: Recruiter-held senior risk, compliance and financial-crime leadership role for a Sydney CBD financial-services business.
items.so_what: Direct senior risk/compliance/financial-crime match; recruiter-held, so register interest quickly.

items.headline: Senior Manager, Governance and Enablement — recruiter-held, Sydney (Oxygen Recruitment & HR)
items.summary: Senior manager leading governance frameworks and enablement for a Sydney organisation.
items.so_what: Core-target senior-manager governance role aligned to your FAICD/governance strength; still live.

items.headline: Senior Manager — Risk & Resilience — recruiter-held, Sydney (Perigon Group)
items.summary: Senior manager owning enterprise risk and operational resilience for a Sydney employer.
items.so_what: Direct senior-manager risk match weighted as core-target; recruiter-held and still live.

items.headline: Senior Risk Manager — recruiter-held, Sydney (Ethos BeathChapman)
items.summary: Senior risk manager role for a financial-services organisation, covering enterprise and operational risk.
items.so_what: Core-target senior risk manager fit; longstanding but still live — worth a direct approach to the recruiter.

items.headline: Audit Manager — recruiter-held, Sydney (Ethos BeathChapman)
items.summary: Internal/external audit manager role for a Sydney financial-services employer.
items.so_what: Relevant internal-audit fit but plain manager level, so a notch below your senior-manager core; still live.

items.headline: ECDD Escalations Outreach Lead | Senior Manager, Risk & Ethics — PwC, Sydney
items.summary: Senior manager in PwC's risk and ethics function leading enhanced customer due-diligence escalations and outreach.
items.so_what: Senior-manager risk fit in professional services; specialised AML/ECDD focus makes it a judgement call against your broader profile.

items.headline: Payments Settlements Risk and Compliance Manager — Reserve Bank of Australia, Sydney
items.summary: Manager owning risk and compliance for payments settlement operations at the RBA.
items.so_what: Strong institution and on-function, but plain manager level caps it at watch; newly listed.

items.headline: Compliance Manager – Licensing and Policy — Macquarie Group, Sydney
items.summary: Compliance manager covering licensing and regulatory policy for Macquarie.
items.so_what: On-function compliance role but plain manager level (capped at watch); newly listed.

items.headline: Financial Controller — recruiter-held, North Shore (Sydney) (Richard Lloyd)
items.summary: Recruiter-held financial controller role for a Sydney North Shore business, owning financial control and reporting.
items.so_what: Finance-leadership fit for your FCPA background; financial-controller level sits just below your exec/senior-manager core — newly listed.

items.headline: Finance Manager — Compliance & Tax — recruiter-held, Sydney (Sharp & Carter)
items.summary: Finance manager role with a compliance and tax focus, c.$200k package, placed through a §1a finance recruiter.
items.so_what: Good finance/compliance blend at a senior package, but plain manager title caps it at watch; newly listed.

items.headline: Head of Transformation — CatholicCare, Lewisham (Sydney)
items.summary: Head-of-transformation role leading change and improvement programs for a large Sydney not-for-profit.
items.so_what: Transformation leadership adjacent to your operations/strategy strengths in an NFP; newly listed alongside the CatholicCare finance exec role.

items.headline: Head of Technology Delivery – Enterprise — icare, Sydney
items.summary: Head-of role owning enterprise technology delivery at the NSW statutory insurer; icare is currently advertising several Head of Technology/Delivery roles.
items.so_what: Strong insurance/government sector fit and head-of level; tech-delivery focus is adjacent to your IT-leadership angle — a stretch but worth a look given the sector.

items.headline: Interim Financial Controller (contract to ~March 2027) — Shippit, Darling Point (Sydney)
items.summary: Interim financial controller on a long contract through ~March 2027 for a Sydney technology/logistics scale-up.
items.so_what: Direct interim finance-leadership match with a long runway; still live and well-suited to short-term/interim contracting — act fast.
